<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="docs/src/deployment/console_access.rst" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-rst-code-docs-src-deployment-console-access-none-40" location="lines:40-57" -->
```
canton {
  remote-participants {
    participant {
      admin-api {
        port = 5002
        address = localhost
      }
      ledger-api {
        port = 5001
        address = localhost
      }
      token = "<auth token>"
    }
  }
  features.enable-preview-commands = yes
  features.enable-testing-commands = yes
  features.enable-repair-commands = yes
}
```
